action.reasoning: Observation: Starting from scratch on a large-scale regression task (124→128, ~10M samples). Need a fast baseline to validate pipeline and measure iteration time. Analysis: A 5-layer MLP with ~4M parameters should train quickly and provide a reasonable baseline. Decision: Implement model.py, train.py, predict.py. Train for only 2 epochs with batch size 2048 to keep runtime short, then submit evaluation immediately to get a score and time estimate.
